snippet.title: Baby Do Die Do - Official Trailer | Huma Qureshi, Rachit, Chunky P | Nachiket Samant | Saqib Saleem
snippet.description:
Presenting the Official Trailer of Baby Do Die Do, an action-packed thriller starring Huma Qureshi, Sikander Kher, Chunky Pandey, Seema Pahwa, Rachit Singh, Vidya Malavade, Himanshu Malik, Marudhar Shekhawat and Arun Kushwah. Directed By Nachiket Samant & Produced By Saqib Saleem.

Get ready for a thrilling journey filled with mystery, suspense, action, and unexpected twists. Watch the trailer now and step into the world of Baby Do Die Do.

In Cinemas 3rd July 2026

Stay updated with the latest videos from Tips Official, Subscribe on the below link.
http://youtube.com/tipsofficial

snippet.title: [HINDI] BMPS 2026 | GRAND FINALS | Day 3 #BGMILIVE
snippet.description:
Download BGMI now: https://bgmi.go.link/2w5kg

This is it! The final day of the BMPS 2026 Grand Finals.

After an incredible journey through every stage of the tournament, it all comes down to one last day. Every elimination, every placement point, and every Chicken Dinner could decide who will be crowned the BMPS 2026 Champions.

Sixteen teams entered the Grand Finals, but only one will lift the trophy and etch their name into BMPS history.

💰 Total Prize Pool: ₹4Cr

Map Rotation
Match ⚔️1 : Rondo
Match ⚔️2 : Erangel
Match ⚔️3 : Erangel
Match ⚔️4 : Erangel
Match ⚔️5 : Miramar
Match ⚔️6 : Miramar

snippet.title: ALPHA | Official Trailer | Alia, Sharvari, Anil, Bobby, Shiv Rawail | YRF Spy Universe | 3 July 2026
snippet.description:
You saw the FIRST KILL. Now get ready to witness THE HUNT. Presenting the Official Trailer of “ALPHA”

Welcome to the newest chapter of the YRF Spy Universe that presents an edgy origin story of a girl raised and built to kill. Alpha is a female-led action film that will take you on a fun, edge of the seat, thrilling ride that is designed as an out and out entertainer.

Yash Raj Films presents Alpha, starring Alia Bhatt, Sharvari, Anil Kapoor, and Bobby Deol. Produced by Aditya Chopra and directed by Shiv Rawail, acclaimed for the globally celebrated series The Railway Men, Alpha is set to release in theatres worldwide on July 3, 2026.

► Subscribe Now: https://goo.gl/xs3mrY 🔔 Stay updated!
► YRF New Releases: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLCB05E03DA939D484

🎬 Movie Credits:
Movie: Alpha
Starring: Alia Bhatt, Sharvari, Anil Kapoor, Bobby Deol
Director: Shiv Rawail
Producer: Aditya Chopra
Co-Producer: Akshaye Widhani
Screenplay: Soumil Shukla, Shridhar Raghavan
Director of Photography: Rubais
Music: Rohansh & Abeer 
Lyrics: Kumaar, Anvitaa Dutt, Kausar Munir, Rohansh & Abeer
Dialogues: Ishita Moitra
Story: Uday Chopra
Associate Producer: Rishabh Chopra
Executive Producer: Padam Bhushan
Editor: Aarif Sheikh
Production Designers: Subrata Chakraborty, Amit Ray
Action Directors: Craig Macrae, Sunil Rodrigues (ROD)
Sound: Ganesh Gangadharan, Debasish Mishra
Background Music: Sanchit Balhara, Ankit Balhara
Costume Designers: Aki Narula, Natasha Vohra, Deepali Singh Raseen, Gunpreet Kaur Mann 
Director of Choreography: Vijay Ganguly, Bosco Leslie Martis
Visual Effects Studio: yFX
Casting Director: Shanoo Sharma
Trailers & Promos: Mohit Sajnaney

Trailer Mixed & Mastered by: Abhishek Khandelwal (YRF Studios), Dileep Nair (Assistant Engineer - YRF Studios)
Trailer Background Music: Jamaican (Bam Bam)
Artist: HUGEL & SOLTO (FR)
Master: MoBlack Records
Publishers: Westbury Music Ltd., Prophesy Music Publishing and Abood Music Ltd.
Music Recreated by: Rohansh & Abeer

Release Date: 3rd July 2026

Stay in the filmy loop:
► Like us on Facebook: Facebook/yrf
► Follow us on X: x.com/yrf
► Follow us on Instagram: Instagram/yrf
► Visit us on: yashrajfilms.com

About YRF Spy Universe:
YRF Spy Universe is a first of its kind cinematic universe of spy thriller films in India. The first film in the universe, "Ek Tha Tiger", starring Salman Khan and Katrina Kaif was released in 2012, followed by its sequel "Tiger Zinda Hai" in 2017. The third film in the universe, "War" was released in 2019 and starred Hrithik Roshan and Tiger Shroff in pivotal roles. "Pathaan" was the fourth instalment in the Spy Universe franchise which was released in 2023 starring Shah Rukh Khan, Deepika Padukone and John Abraham. "Tiger 3", the fifth instalment in the YRF Spy Universe and the third film in the Tiger series, starring Salman Khan, Katrina Kaif and Emraan Hashmi, released in 2023. "War 2", the sixth film in the YRF Spy Universe, starring Hrithik Roshan, NTR and Kiara Advani, directed by Ayan Mukerji, released on 14 August 2025. "Alpha", the seventh film in the franchise and Hindi cinema’s first female-led YRF Spy Universe film, starring Alia Bhatt and Sharvari, will release on 3 July 2026.

#yrfspyuniverse #yrfnewreleases #yrf #alpha #yashraj #yashrajfilms #yrfmovies #yrfmusic #yashchopra #adityachopra #akshayewidhani #aliabhatt #sharvari #anilkapoor #bobbydeol #shivrawail 

© Yash Raj Films Pvt. Ltd.

About YRF Spy Universe:
YRF Spy Universe is a first of its kind cinematic universe of spy thriller films in India. The first film in the universe, "Ek Tha Tiger", starring Salman Khan and Katrina Kaif was released in 2012, followed by its sequel "Tiger Zinda Hai" in 2017. The third film in the universe, "War" was released in 2019 and starred Hrithik Roshan and Tiger Shroff in pivotal roles. "Pathaan" was the fourth instalment in the Spy Universe franchise which was released in 2023 starring Shah Rukh Khan, Deepika Padukone and John Abraham. "Tiger 3", the fifth instalment in the YRF Spy Universe and the third film in the Tiger series, starring Salman Khan, Katrina Kaif and Emraan Hashmi, released in 2023. "War 2", the sixth film in the YRF Spy Universe, starring Hrithik Roshan, NTR and Kiara Advani, directed by Ayan Mukerji, released on 14 August 2025. "Alpha", the seventh film in the franchise and Hindi cinema’s first female-led YRF Spy Universe film, starring Alia Bhatt and Sharvari, will release on 3 July 2026.

en-GB.description:
You saw the FIRST KILL. Now get ready to witness THE HUNT. Presenting the Official Trailer of “ALPHA”

Welcome to the newest chapter of the YRF Spy Universe that presents an edgy origin story of a girl raised and built to kill. Alpha is a female-led action film that will take you on a fun, edge of the seat, thrilling ride that is designed as an out and out entertainer.

Yash Raj Films presents Alpha, starring Alia Bhatt, Sharvari, Anil Kapoor, and Bobby Deol. Produced by Aditya Chopra and directed by Shiv Rawail, acclaimed for the globally celebrated series The Railway Men, Alpha is set to release in theatres worldwide on July 3, 2026.

snippet.description:

snippet.description:
राज कपूर के दिलों पर राज करने वाले गीत l दीवाना मुझको लोग कहें l Hits Of Mukesh l Diwana l Old Song 

► Song Credits 

Song: Diwana Mujhko Log Kahen
Artist: Mukesh
Music Director: Shankar-Jaikishan
Lyricist: Hasrat Jaipuri

► SONG LYRICS

deewana mujhko log kahen
main samjhun jag hai deewana
main samjhun jag hai deewana
deewana mujhko log kahen
main samjhun jag hai deewana
main samjhun jag hai deewana
deewana mujhko log kahen

hansta hai koi surat pe meri
hansta hai koi sirat pe meri
chhota hi sahi par dil hai bada
maein jhoomta paimana
deewana mujhko log

maein insaan seedha saadha hoon
imaan ka maein shehzaada hoon
hai kaun bura malik jane
maein pyar ka parwana
deewana mujhko log

maein pyar ki khatir mit jaaun
aur pyar ki khatir lut jaaun
chalta hi rahoon rah-e-manzil
anjaam khuda jaane
deewana mujhko log

Welcome to our channel dedicated to the timeless music of the 50s, 60s, 70s, 80s, and 90s.
Enjoy daily collections of evergreen songs including romantic, sad, dance, classical, and iconic hits.
If you love golden-era music, this is the perfect place for you.

हमारे चैनल में आपका स्वागत है, जो 50s, 60s, 70s, 80s और 90s के सदाबहार संगीत को समर्पित है।
यहाँ आपको रोज़ाना रोमांटिक, सैड, डांस, क्लासिकल और कई आइकॉनिक एवरग्रीन गानों का शानदार संग्रह सुनने को मिलेगा।
अगर आपको गोल्डन एरा के गाने पसंद हैं, तो यह चैनल आपके लिए बिल्कुल परफेक्ट जगह है।

Tera Intezaar Reh Jaata Hai, 90s style deep love romantic Hindi song hai jo dil ke sabse gehre jazbaat ko bayan karta hai. Ye gana un logon ke liye hai jo true love, one-side love, pure emotions aur soulful romance ko mehsoos karte hain. Is gaane me wahi purana Bollywood 90s ka magic hai — jahan mohabbat shor nahi karti, balki khamoshi me bhi bol jaati hai ❤️

Agar aapko 90s romantic songs, deep love songs, heart touching Hindi songs aur emotional Bollywood love music pasand hai, to ye song aapke dil ko zaroor chhoo jaayega.
Is gaane ka har lafz pyaar, dard aur sukoon ko ek saath mehsoos karata hai.

Tere Naam Mein Mera Sukoon un yaadon ko wapas le aata hai jab gaane sirf sunne ke liye nahi, balki mehsoos karne ke liye bane hote the.
Ye gana un logon ke liye hai:

Jo saccha pyaar karte hain

Jo aaj bhi 90s Bollywood ke deewane hain

Jo romantic aur soulful songs sunna pasand karte hain

Jo apni feelings shabdon me nahi keh paate

Romantic | Emotional | Deep Love | 90s Bollywood Vibes

Tera Intezaar Reh Jaata Hai, 90s style deep love romantic Hindi song hai jo dil ke sabse gehre jazbaat ko bayan karta hai. Ye gana un logon ke liye hai jo true love, one-side love, pure emotions aur soulful romance ko mehsoos karte hain. Is gaane me wahi purana Bollywood 90s ka magic hai — jahan mohabbat shor nahi karti, balki khamoshi me bhi bol jaati hai ❤️

Agar aapko 90s romantic songs, deep love songs, heart touching Hindi songs aur emotional Bollywood love music pasand hai, to ye song aapke dil ko zaroor chhoo jaayega.
Is gaane ka har lafz pyaar, dard aur sukoon ko ek saath mehsoos karata hai.

Tere Naam Mein Mera Sukoon un yaadon ko wapas le aata hai jab gaane sirf sunne ke liye nahi, balki mehsoos karne ke liye bane hote the.
Ye gana un logon ke liye hai:

Jo saccha pyaar karte hain

Jo aaj bhi 90s Bollywood ke deewane hain

Jo romantic aur soulful songs sunna pasand karte hain

Jo apni feelings shabdon me nahi keh paate


🎶 Song Feel:
Romantic | Emotional | Deep Love | 90s Bollywood Vibes

📌 Recommended For:
90s Hindi Songs lovers, Romantic reels, Love status videos, Emotional edits, Bollywood nostalgic songs fans

snippet.title: KLARA AND THE SUN – Official Trailer (4K)
snippet.description:
Meet Klara. Your new best (artificial) friend. 🌞

Jenna Ortega is Klara in Director Taika Waititi’s adaptation of Kazuo Ishiguro’s #KlaraAndTheSun - coming exclusively to theatres October 23. Watch the trailer now.

KLARA AND THE SUN

Comedy/Drama

October 23, 2026
Based on the bestselling novel from Nobel Prize-winner Kazuo Ishiguro and written and directed by Academy-Award® winner Taika Waititi (Jojo Rabbit), Klara and the Sun introduces audiences to Klara (Jenna Ortega), an Artificial Friend who wants nothing more than to find the perfect home. When Klara meets Josie (Mia Tharia), each immediately senses a kindred spirit in the other. Josie has a fraught relationship with her mother (Amy Adams) and they’ve suffered great loss, but Klara’s innocent wonder and unwavering loyalty begin to heal the family and bring light to Josie’s complicated world.
 
Directed by:​​​​​
Taika Waititi
 
Screenplay by:​​​​
Taika Waititi and Dahvi Waller
 
Based on the book by:​​​
Kazuo Ishiguro
 
Produced by: ​​​​​
David Heyman, p.g.a.
Garrett Basch, p.g.a.
Taika Waititi, p.g.a.
 
Executive Producers:​​​​
Gary Barber
​​​​​​Alex G. Scott
​​​​​​Jeffrey Clifford
Rosie Alison
Kazuo Ishiguro
 
Cast: ​​​​​​
Jenna Ortega
​​​​​​Amy Adams
Mia Tharia
Aran Murphy​
with Steve Buscemi
and Natasha Lyonne
 
This film is rated PG-13 by The Motion Picture Association for the following reasons: thematic elements, some violence and strong language.

Thumbnail  : AMEET Mashup
Video Edit   : AMEET Mashup

❤️ Ishq X Barbaad Mashup ❤️

Experience a soul-stirring musical journey where the timeless emotions of love, longing, and heartbreak come together in one unforgettable mashup. "Ishq X Barbaad Mashup" beautifully blends the soothing melodies of Ishq with the heartfelt pain of Barbaad, creating a perfect soundtrack for every romantic soul.

🎵 Featuring the magical voices and musical essence of:
• Faheem Abdullah – Ishq
• Jubin Nautiyal – Barbaad
• Arijit Singh – Romantic Classics Inspiration

This mashup is crafted with smooth transitions, emotional vocals, and cinematic vibes that will take you through the highs and lows of love. Whether you're in love, missing someone special, or simply enjoying soulful music, this mashup is made for you.

snippet.title: फूल फूल पे बनी है | Phool | Udit Narayan Songs | Madhuri Dixit | Kumar Gaurav
snippet.description:
उदित नारायण की मखमली आवाज़ में 'फूल फूल पे बनी है' एक ऐसा नगमा है जो नब्बे के दशक की यादें ताज़ा कर देता है। यह गीत प्यार और रोमांस की एक अनोखी दास्तान है।



Credits :

Song: Phool Phool Pe Bani Hai
Album: Phool
Artist: Udit Narayan
Music Director: Anand-Milind
Lyricist: Anand Bakshi 



Lyrics :

Baharo ki maangi huyi ek dua
Hazaro ki maangi huyi iltja
Hazaro baras mein kabhi ho kabul
To khilta hai tumsa hansi ek phool


Phool phool pe bani teri tasveer
Phool phool pe bani teri tasveer
Phool phool pe likha hai tera naam
Ho tujhe salam tujhe salam


Phool phool pe bani teri tasveer
Phool phool pe bani teri tasveer
Phool phool pe likha hai tera naam
Ho tujhe salam tujhe salam
Tujhe salam tujhe salam
Tujhe salam tujhe salam
Tujhe salam tujhe salam
Tujhe salam tujhe salam
Tujhe salam tujhe salam


Ithlake balkha ke tu
Kaise kadam uthati hai
Ithlake balkha ke tu
Kaise kadam uthati hai
Aise kadam uthati hai
Jaise kasam uthati hai
Aise kadam uthati hai
Jaise kasam uthati hai
Aaj ko ho jayega barbad
Aaj ko ho jayega badnam
Ho tujhe salam tujhe salam


Galo se ye lagta hai
Ek masum kaval hai tu
Galo se ye lagta hai
Ek masum kaval hai tu
Hotho se ye lagta hai
Ek rangin gajal hai tu
Hotho se ye lagta hai
Ek rangin gajal hai tu
Teri zulfe sawan ki rate
Teri aankhe shishe ke do jam
Ho tujhe salam tujhe salam


Kisi geet ke mukhde sa
Dil kash tera mukhda hai
Kisi geet ke mukhde sa
Dil kash tera mukhda hai
Is duniya ki chij nahi tu
Ek chand ka tukda hai
Kisi geet ke mukhde sa
Dil kash tera mukhda hai
Is duniya ki chij nahi tu
Ek chand ka tukda hai
Main to insan phariste bhi
Main to insan phariste bhi


Teri kasam ban jaye tere gulam
Ho tujhe salam tujhe salam
Ho phool phool pe bani meri tasveer
Phool phool pe bani meri tasveer
Phool phool pe likha hai mera naam
Tujhe salam ho tujhe salam
Tujhe salam tujhe salam
Tujhe salam ho tujhe salam
Tujhe salam tujhe salam.

इस सदाबहार गीत को सुनकर आपका मन सुकून से भर जाएगा। अगर आपको यह गाना पसंद आया, तो कृपया वीडियो को लाइक करें, कमेंट में अपना पसंदीदा गाना बताएं और हमारे चैनल को सब्सक्राइब करें।

Featuring Akshay Kumar and Lara Dutta, the song remains one of the most loved romantic tracks from the golden era of Bollywood music.

Movie: Andaaz (2003)

Vishwanath & Sons is an upcoming Tamil-Telugu film, starring Suriya, Mamitha Baiju, Radhika Sarathkumar, and Raveena Tandon in pivotal roles. Directed by Venky Atluri, the film is produced by Suryadevara Naga Vamsi and Sai Soujanya under Sithara Entertainments and Fortune Four Cinemas, and presented by Srikara Studios.

Featuring music by G. V. Prakash Kumar, cinematography by Nimish Ravi, editing by Navin Nooli, and production design by Banglan.

snippet.title: हनुमान जी के भजन | Hanuman Bhajan l Balaji Bhajan 2026| Hanuman Ji ke Bhajan | Bhajan
snippet.description:
मंगलवार स्पेशल।हनुमान जी के भजन | Hanuman Bhajan l Balaji Bhajan 2026| Hanuman Ji ke Bhajan | Bhajan

तो आईए आज पावन हृदय से इस भजन द्वारा जो मांगना है मांग लीजिए।
श्याम बाबा सबकी मनोकामनांए पूर्ण करें। 🙏


⭐Song : 
 श्री राम की गली में तुम जाना
घुंघरू बाजे रे बजरंग नाचे रे
लहर-लहर लहराए रे झंडा 
छम छम नाचे देखो वीर हनुमाना
श्री हनुमान चालीसा
जय जय जय हनुमान गुसाईं
संकट मोचन हनुमान अष्टक
आना पवन कुमार हमारे हरि कीर्तन
ये चमक ये दमक सब कुछ सरकार 
श्री हनुमान जी की आरती

⭐Singer :Upasana Mehta
⭐Lyrics : Traditional
⭐Music: Binny Narang (9991980610)
⭐Video: Shalini Sharma (7015960610)
⭐Label Bhakti Sadhna (9466651081)
⭐Category: Hindi Devotional (Shyam Bhajan)

छम छम नाचे देखो वीर हनुमाना
श्री हनुमान चालीसा
जय जय जय हनुमान गुसाईं
संकट मोचन हनुमान अष्टक
आना पवन कुमार हमारे हरि कीर्तन
ये चमक ये दमक सब कुछ सरकार 
श्री हनुमान जी की आरती

⭐Singer :Upasana Mehta
⭐Lyrics : Traditional
⭐Music: Binny Narang (9991980610)
⭐Video: Shalini Sharma (7015960610)
⭐Label Bhakti Sadhna (9466651081)
⭐Category: Hindi Devotional (Shyam Bhajan)

snippet.title: Bandhu 2.0 | Shahid, Kriti, Rashmika| Pritam | Kavita | Neeraj | Irshad K | Cocktail 2 | 19th June
snippet.description:
Tumhi din chadhe, tumhi din dhale,
Tumhi ho bandhu, sakha tumhi! 💃

Shahid Kapoor, Kriti Sanon and Rashmika Mandanna are back with ‘Bandhu 2.0’ from ‘Cocktail 2’! Composed by Pritam, penned by Irshad Kamil and sung by Kavita Seth and Neeraj Shridhar, get ready to get back in time and groove with it!

#Bandhu2.0 #Cocktail2 #ShahidKapoor #KritiSanon #RashmikaMandanna 

🎧 Song Credits 
Featuring: Shahid Kapoor, Kriti Sanon & Rashmika Mandanna 
Directed by : Amar Kaushik
Singer: Kavita Sheth and Neeraj Shridhar
Music Composer: Pritam Chakraborty 
Lyrics: Irshad Kamil
Mixed and Mastered by - Eric Pillai at Future Sound of Bombay
Assistant to Eric Pillai - Michael Edwin Pillai

#Cocktail2, releasing in cinemas on 19th June 2026

🎬 Video Credits
Cast: Shahid Kapoor, Kriti Sanon, Rashmika Mandanna
Directed By: Homi Adajania 
Produced By: Dinesh Vijan, Luv Ranjan, Pramita R Vijan and Ankur Garg 
Written By: Tarun Jain and Luv Ranjan
Co-Producers: Sharada Karki Jalota, Pooja Prem Patheja
Director of Photography: Santhana Krishnan Ravichandran
Original Song and Background Score: Pritam Chakraborty   
Costume Designer: Anaita Shroff Adajania 
Director of Choreography: Jaani Master
Publicity Design: Himanshu & Rahul Nanda (H-one)

Lyrics:
Yaara tere sadke
Ishq sikha main toh aayi jag tajh ke
Ishq sikha
Main toh yaara tere sadke
Main toh aayi jag tajh ke
Ishq sikha
Jab yaar kare parwah meri
Mujhe kya parwah iss duniya ki
Jag mujhpe lagaaye pabandhi
Main hoon hi nahi iss duniya ki
Tumhi din chadhe
Tumhi din dhale
Tumhi ho bandhu
Sakha tumhi
Tumhi din chadhe
Tumhi din dhale
Tumhi ho bandhu
Sakha tumhi
Everytime every minute of the day
Tumhi ho bandhu
Sakha tumhi
Tumhi din chadhe
Tumhi din dhale
Tumhi ho bandhu
Sakha tumhi
Dil ki takhti par hoon likhti
Ishqan ishqan
Jag kya jaane dil ko mere
Ishqan kiska
Dil ki takhti par hoon likhti
Ishqan ishqan
Jag kya jaane dil ko mere
Ishqan kiska
Rabb yaar gale le saar meri
Mujhe kya parwah iss duniya ki
Tu jeet meri jag haar meri
Main hoon hi nahi iss duniya ki
Tumhi din chadhe

Tumhi ho bandhu

snippet.title: 🔴 [HI] GRAND FINALS - CHAMPION RUSH | FFMAI 2026 SUMMER
snippet.description:
THE GRAND FINALS OF FFMAI 2026 SUMMER IS HERE!
After a gruelling Main Event stage, 12 teams have qualified for the GRAND FINALS, which will be played in CHAMPION RUSH format!

The Top 12 finalists-
♦ Revenant XSpark
♦ Team Apex Gaming
♦ S8UL Esports
♦ All Gamers Global
♦ Team Falcons
♦ RRQ Kazu
♦ Bigetron By Vitality
♦ Aurora Gaming
♦ Hotshot Esports
♦ Titan Esports Club
♦ Straw Hats
♦ DEMONS PRIDE

Champion Rush format-
Any team that reaches 90 points will activate Champion Rush.
The team to win a Booyah! after activating Champion Rush will be crowned CHAMPIONS!

Schedule 📋
📅 Grand Finals - June 21

Are you ready to witness the champion, who will be CROWNED BY FIRE!

#FFMAI2026 #FFM #crownedbyfire 

[FFM, FFESPORTS, FFINDIA, FFMAI, FFMAI2026, FFMIC, Free Fire, Free Fire Max, Free Fire Max India, Free Fire Max Esports]

Humble Motion Pictures FZCO presents 
🎬 Carry On Jatta 4 

The madness continues bigger and crazier than ever. Get ready for a laughter-packed Punjabi blockbuster full of twists and chaos. Releasing worldwide in cinemas on 26th June 2026 

Starcast - Gippy Grewal, Binnu Dhillon, Sargun Mehta, Gurpreet Ghuggi, Late Jaswinder Bhalla Ji, Karamjit Anmol,  Prince Kanwaljit Singh,Pukhraj Bhalla, BN Sharma, Shinda Grewal, Jasmine Bajwa, Bhana LA, Seema Kaushal, Sweetaj Brar, Pawan Johal, Jassi Longowalia

Movie – Carry On Jatta 4
Produced by - Gippy Grewal & Ravneet Kaur Grewal
Directed By - Smeep Kang 
Story, Screenplay & Dialogue – Naresh Kathooria
Lyrics - Happy Raikoti 
Music Director – A Jatinder Shah Musical
Music Partner/Rights - IVY Music
Editor - Rohit Dhiman 
DOP - Sukh Kamboj 
Co-Producer - Bhana LA 
Executive Producer - Hardeep Dullat 
Digital Media & PR - Aman Mehta & Vishali Kotru
Production Head - Akshay Rawat 
Associate Director – Amit R Singh & Sanju Yadav 
Post Production- Rabab Music Productions Pvt. Ltd.
Teaser Mix & Master (Stereo)   :- Sameer Charegaonkar 
VFX – Identical Brains Studios
Motion Graphics – Junaid Ansari
Art Director - Ritesh Kumar ( Pinky ) 
Visual promotions - Hashtag Studios(Pratham Verma) 
Costume designer - Rakesh Chauhan ( Rocky) 
Poster Designer - Impressive design studio (Balvir Rehal)
Still, Making - Daas Films

Money Aujla

Lyrics - 
Bhul gaya raah nindran nu meri akh da, 
Kakh da reha ni dil, hunda si jo lakh da.
Bhul gaya raah nindran nu meri akh da, 
Kakh da reha ni dil, hunda si jo lakh da.
Chain udd da udd da jaave, 
Udd da udd da jaave. 
Mohalle vichon kaun langiya? 
Mehak hawawan vichon aave.
Mehak hawawan vichon aave, 
Mohalle vichon kaun langiya?
Haye ve haye sajna, Tere hum saaye sajna. Tere aa ve kahnu kakhan vich rolle? 
Tu taa sahan vich bole meriyaan ve, 
meriyaan ve
Ohde maathe chanda chamkda, 
Te ballan vich taare. 
Jine vi farishte rabb de, 
Ohde sake sabandhi saare.
Ohde maathe chanda chamkda, 
Te julfan de vich taare. 
Jine vi farishte rabb de, 
Ohde sake sabandhi saare.
Naa pive naa khave, 
Naa pive naa khave. 
Mohalle vichon kaun langiya? 
Mehak hawawan vichon aave.
Kayanaat ch vakhri lor ae, 
Mere dil vich sundaa shor ae. 
Mera sohna sohna rahega nahi, 
Ohde warga hor ae.
Dil jis val khichda jaave, 
Jis val khichda jaave. 
Mohalle vichon kaun langiya? 
Mehak hawawan vichon aave.
Mehak hawawan vichon aave, 
Mohalle vichon kaun langiya?
Haye ve haye sajna, 
Tere hum saaye sajna.
Tere aa ve kahnu kakhan vich rolle? 
Tu tan sahan vich bole meriyaan ve.

Mohalle vichon kaun langiya? 
Mehak hawawan vichon aave.
Kayanaat ch vakhri lor ae, 
Mere dil vich sundaa shor ae. 
Mera sohna sohna rahega nahi, 
Ohde warga hor ae.
Dil jis val khichda jaave, 
Jis val khichda jaave. 
Mohalle vichon kaun langiya? 
Mehak hawawan vichon aave.
Mehak hawawan vichon aave, 
Mohalle vichon kaun langiya?
Haye ve haye sajna, 
Tere hum saaye sajna.
Tere aa ve kahnu kakhan vich rolle? 
Tu tan sahan vich bole meriyaan ve.

snippet.title: Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe Official Video Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya #bollywood #hindisong #2026
snippet.description:
Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe (Official Video ) (Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya) || Romantic Bollywood Hits Song 2026
Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya 2.0 💞 90s Bollywood Romantic Vibe | Soulful New Version

Song - Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe


तेरे बिना सूना है जहाँ, तेरे बिना तन्हा है दिल,
तेरे बिना हर धड़कन में, बस गूँजता है तेरा सिलसिला।
तेरी यादों की चादर ओढ़े, हर रात गुज़र जाती है,
तेरी तस्वीर आँखों में, फिर भी आँखें भीग जाती हैं।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरे होंठों की मुस्कान में, मैंने खुदा का नूर देखा,
तेरे आँचल की छाँव में, सारा सुकून देखा।
तेरी आवाज़ में वो मिठास है, जो साजों को जगा देती है,
तेरी खामोशी भी अब तो, मेरी रूह को सजा देती है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

कभी तेरी बातें याद आईं, तो दिल मुस्कुरा उठा,
कभी तेरी दूरी ने छू लिया, तो दिल बिखर उठा।
तेरे बिना जो जीना पड़ा, वो जीना ना रहा,
तेरे बिना हर लम्हा मेरा, अधूरा-सा रहा।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरे जाने के बाद भी, तेरा एहसास रहता है,
हर शाम तेरी यादों का, साया पास रहता है।
तेरे ख़त के अक्षर अब भी, महकते हैं जैसे फूल,
तेरे नाम से ही चलती हैं, मेरी हर मंज़िल की धूल।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरी आँखों में जो गहराई है, उसमें मेरा जहाँ है,
तेरे इश्क़ की पनाहों में, मेरी पहचान है।
तेरी राहों में बिछ जाऊँ, अगर तू मुस्कुराए,
तेरी ख़ुशी में अपनी हर सांस, मैं कुर्बान कर जाऊँ।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

कभी खामोशी में तेरा नाम लूँ, तो आँसू चल पड़ते हैं,
कभी तेरे ख़्वाबों में खो जाऊँ, तो लम्हे थम पड़ते हैं।
तेरे जाने के बाद भी, दिल तुझसे बातें करता है,
हर तन्हा रात में अब भी, तेरा ही ज़िक्र करता है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

अब बस इतना कह दूँ तुझसे, लौट आ किसी बहाने,
तेरे बिना ये दिल मेरा, टूटे पत्ते जैसा दीवाने।
तेरे प्यार में ही तो मेरी, दुनिया पूरी होती है,
तेरे आने से ही मेरी, ज़िंदगी रोशन होती है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरी आवाज़ में वो मिठास है, जो साजों को जगा देती है,
तेरी खामोशी भी अब तो, मेरी रूह को सजा देती है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

कभी तेरी बातें याद आईं, तो दिल मुस्कुरा उठा,
कभी तेरी दूरी ने छू लिया, तो दिल बिखर उठा।
तेरे बिना जो जीना पड़ा, वो जीना ना रहा,
तेरे बिना हर लम्हा मेरा, अधूरा-सा रहा।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरे जाने के बाद भी, तेरा एहसास रहता है,
हर शाम तेरी यादों का, साया पास रहता है।
तेरे ख़त के अक्षर अब भी, महकते हैं जैसे फूल,
तेरे नाम से ही चलती हैं, मेरी हर मंज़िल की धूल।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरी आँखों में जो गहराई है, उसमें मेरा जहाँ है,
तेरे इश्क़ की पनाहों में, मेरी पहचान है।
तेरी राहों में बिछ जाऊँ, अगर तू मुस्कुराए,
तेरी ख़ुशी में अपनी हर सांस, मैं कुर्बान कर जाऊँ।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

कभी खामोशी में तेरा नाम लूँ, तो आँसू चल पड़ते हैं,
कभी तेरे ख़्वाबों में खो जाऊँ, तो लम्हे थम पड़ते हैं।
तेरे जाने के बाद भी, दिल तुझसे बातें करता है,
हर तन्हा रात में अब भी, तेरा ही ज़िक्र करता है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

अब बस इतना कह दूँ तुझसे, लौट आ किसी बहाने,
तेरे बिना ये दिल मेरा, टूटे पत्ते जैसा दीवाने।
तेरे प्यार में ही तो मेरी, दुनिया पूरी होती है,
तेरे आने से ही मेरी, ज़िंदगी रोशन होती है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖

✅কপিরাইট আইন ১৯৭৬-এর ১০৭ ধারা অনুযায়ী কপিরাইট দাবিত্যাগ, সমালোচনা, মন্তব্য, সংবাদ প্রতিবেদন, শিক্ষাদান, বৃত্তি এবং গবেষণার মতো উদ্দেশ্যে "ন্যায্য ব্যবহারের" অনুমতি দেওয়া হয়েছে। ন্যায্য ব্যবহার হলো কপিরাইট আইন দ্বারা অনুমোদিত একটি ব্যবহার যা অন্যথায় লঙ্ঘনকারী হতে পারে। অলাভজনক, শিক্ষামূলক বা ব্যক্তিগত ব্যবহারের ক্ষেত্রে ফেয়ার ইউজের (ন্যায্য ব্যবহার) পাল্লা ভারী থাকে।

✅ভিডিও গেম ডিসক্লেইমার: এই ভিডিওর বিষয়বস্তু শুধুমাত্র শিক্ষামূলক ব্যবহারের জন্য। গেমপ্লেটি হলো Battlegrounds Mobile India (BGMI) নামক একটি ভিডিও গেম এবং এটি একটি কাল্পনিক সৃষ্টি।

➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖
✅যারা আমার ভিডিও দেখেন, লাইক, শেয়ার এবং কমেন্ট করেন, তাদের সবাইকে অসংখ্য ধন্যবাদ। আপনাদের কাছে এটি হয়তো একটি ছোট বিষয় মনে হতে পারে, কিন্তু আমি আপনাদের প্রত্যেককে আন্তরিকভাবে ধন্যবাদ জানাই। আপনাদের দেওয়া সমস্ত মতামত এবং মন্তব্যই আমাদের চ্যানেলকে আজকের এই পর্যায়ে নিয়ে আসতে সাহায্য করেছে।
তাই আবারও, আপনাদের সবাইকে অসংখ্য ধন্যবাদ!!! 😍

➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖

snippet.title: Ek Aakhri Mulakat – Aarzoo Khaan | Emotional Hindi Sad Song | New Song 2026 | Arijit Singh Vibe
snippet.description:
Ek Aakhri Mulakat – Aarzoo Khaan | Emotional Hindi Sad Song | New Song 2026 | Arijit Singh Vibe


---


Ek aakhri mulakat...
bas itni si khwahish baaki hai.

Na koi shikayat karni hai...
na koi gila kehna hai...
bas ek baar tujhe dekh kar
khamosh ho jana hai.

Mohabbat adhuri sahi...
par ehsaas aaj bhi wahi hai.

Jo baatein kabhi keh na sake...
wo aankhon se keh denge...
agar ek aakhri mulakat ho jaaye.

“Ek Aakhri Mulakat”
ek aise dil ki kahani hai
jo bichhadne ke baad bhi
sirf ek mulaqat ka intezar karta raha.

Waqt badal gaya...
raaste badal gaye...
magar dil ki khwahish
aaj bhi wahi hai.

Is gaane mein
mohabbat bhi hai,
intezar bhi hai,
aur ek gehra ehsaas bhi
jo dheere se kehta hai —

ek aakhri mulakat ho jaaye...
phir shayad sukoon mil jaaye...

Agar aapne bhi
kabhi kisi ko
apni rooh se zyada chaha ho
aur usse ek baar phir dekhne ki tamanna rakhi ho,
to ye gaana
aapke dil ko chhoo jaayega.

🎙️ Voice: Aarzoo Khaan
🎧 Vibe: Emotional • Deep • Heartbreak • Soulful (Arijit Singh Vibe)


---

🎧 Listen on Streaming Platforms

Spotify ► https://open.spotify.com/artist/1qfsPgztwYGU0GUCNgDiLW

---

en-IN.title: Ek Aakhri Mulakat – Aarzoo Khaan | Emotional Hindi Sad Song | New Song 2026 | Arijit Singh Vibe
en-IN.description:
Ek Aakhri Mulakat – Aarzoo Khaan | Emotional Hindi Sad Song | New Song 2026 | Arijit Singh Vibe


---


Ek aakhri mulakat...
bas itni si khwahish baaki hai.

Na koi shikayat karni hai...
na koi gila kehna hai...
bas ek baar tujhe dekh kar
khamosh ho jana hai.

Mohabbat adhuri sahi...
par ehsaas aaj bhi wahi hai.

Jo baatein kabhi keh na sake...
wo aankhon se keh denge...
agar ek aakhri mulakat ho jaaye.

“Ek Aakhri Mulakat”
ek aise dil ki kahani hai
jo bichhadne ke baad bhi
sirf ek mulaqat ka intezar karta raha.

Waqt badal gaya...
raaste badal gaye...
magar dil ki khwahish
aaj bhi wahi hai.

Is gaane mein
mohabbat bhi hai,
intezar bhi hai,
aur ek gehra ehsaas bhi
jo dheere se kehta hai —

ek aakhri mulakat ho jaaye...
phir shayad sukoon mil jaaye...

Agar aapne bhi
kabhi kisi ko
apni rooh se zyada chaha ho
aur usse ek baar phir dekhne ki tamanna rakhi ho,
to ye gaana
aapke dil ko chhoo jaayega.

🎙️ Voice: Aarzoo Khaan
🎧 Vibe: Emotional • Deep • Heartbreak • Soulful (Arijit Singh Vibe)

snippet.title: Franklin & Shinchan Turn Their House Into A Dairy Milk Mansion In GTA 5! | GTA 5 Bangla Gameplay
snippet.description:
GTA 5: Franklin & Shinchan Turn Their House Into A Dairy Milk Mansion! 🍫🏠😱 | GTA 5 Bangla Gameplay
#tsunami #shinchan #shinchangta5

In this GTA 5 Bangla episode, Franklin and Shinchan transform their normal house into a giant Dairy Milk chocolate mansion! From chocolate walls and candy decorations to sweet surprises everywhere, this becomes the sweetest house in Los Santos.

🍫 Dairy Milk Mansion | GTA 5 Bangla Story | Chocolate House | Fun Transformation

Featuring full Bangla voiceover and cinematic editing, this episode delivers fun moments, creative house upgrades, and amazing chocolate-themed adventures.

💬 Would you live inside a giant Dairy Milk mansion?

Sava lakh ki jutti re

Chandi ka mera vir al nada
Delhi ke ma kotti re

tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 
tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 

Up ke ma dunga maru halle delhi sari ri
Dur dur ta nigah gadave rande cheel juhari ri

Love you bhabhi

tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 
tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 

do balka ki ma bngi ma lagu kati kavari si 
Dhunge mere jholl marre

Chotti nag bnari ri
Bin hi bja du kya

tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 
tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri

लव यू भाभी

तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री

तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री

snippet.title: Choli Ke Peeche Kya Hai - 8K Video Song | Sanjay Dutt & Madhuri Dixit | All Time Hit Song
snippet.description:
Song Credits:
Song: Choli Ke Peeche Kya Hai 
Movie:  Khal Nayak (1993)
Singer: Alka Yagnik & Ila Arun
Composer: Laxmikant-Pyarelal
Lyrics: Anand Bakshi

Movie Credits:
Cast : Sanjay Dutt, Jackie Shroff, Madhuri Dixit, Raakhee, Anupam Kher
Director : Subhash Ghai
Producer : Subhash Ghai

Lyrics:

Ku Ku Ku Ku Ku Ku Ku…………
Choli Ke Peechhe Kya Hai,
Choli Ke Peechhe
Choli Ke Peechhe Kya Hai,
Choli Ke Peechhe
Chunari Ke Niche Kya Hai,
Chunari Ke Niche

Ho Choli Mein Dil Hai Mera,
Chunari Mein Dil Hai Mera
Choli Mein Dil Hai Mera,
Chunari Mein Dil Hai Mera
Yeh Dil Mein Dungi Mere Yar Ko, Pyar Ko
Aah Ku Ku Ku Ku Ku Ku Ku…………

Are Lakhon Deewane Tere, Lakhon Deewane
Aashiq Purane Tere, Aashiq Purane
Ho Aashiq Mila Naa Aisa Hmmm,
Meri Pasand Jaisa Hmmm
Be Dil Shahar Yeh Aisa,
Kya Karu Kya Karu
Hay Ku Ku Ku Ku Ku Ku Ku…………

Ku Ku Ku Ku Ku Ku Ku…………
Resham Kaa Lahanga Meraa,
Resham Kaa Lahanga
Lahanga Hai Mahanga Meraa,
Ahanga Hai Mahanga
Lahanga Utha Ke Chalu,
Ghunghat Gira Ke Chalu
Kya Kya Bacha Ke Chalu Ramaji Ramaji
Hay Ku Ku Ku Ku Ku Ku Ku…………

Are Isako Bachalo Babu, Iss Ko Bachalo
Dil Me Chhupalo Babu, Dil Mein Chhupalo
Ho Aashiq Pade Hain Pichhe O Ho
Koyi Idhar Ko Khinche Hmmm
Koyi Udhar Ko Khinche Kya Karu Kya Karu
Hay Ku Ku Ku Ku Ku Ku Ku…………

Ku Ku Ku Ku Ku Ku Ku…………
Hai Shadi Karado Meri O Ho,
Shadi Karado Hmmm
Doli Sajado Meri Doli
Saja Do Ah Ha Ah Ha
Sautan Bana Naa Jaye,
Jogan Bana Naa Jaye
Joban Saha Naa Jaye
Kya Karu, Kya Karu Hai Chhori
Ku Ku Ku…………

Are Ladaki Ho Kaisi Bolo,
Ladaki Ho Kaisi
Ladaka Ho Kaisa Bolo
Ladaka Ho Kaisa
Ho Ladaki Ho Mere Jaisi Aah Ha,
Ladaka Ho Tere Jaisa Wah Wah
Aaye Maja Phir Kaisa,
Pyar Kaa Pyar Kaa Wah
Ku Ku Ku…………

Ku Ku Ku Ku Ku…………
Ho…Jhumari Kaa Jumaru Ban Ja,
Jhumari Kaa Jumaru Kich Kich
Payal Kaa, Ghungharu Ban Ja
Payal Kaa Ghungaru Kich Kich
Meri Salami Kar Le, Meri Ghulami Kar Le
Hoga Too Hoga Koyi
Badashah, Badashah Are Jan
Ku Ku Ku…………

Bali Umariya Meri Bali Umariya
Suni Sajariya Meri Suni Sajariya
Mere Sapano Ke Raja,
Jaldi Se Vapas Aaja Ah
Soti Hoon Main
Daravaja Khol Ke, Khol Ke Ah
Ku Ku Ku…………

Begam Bagair Badashah Kis Kam Kaa
Badashah Bagair Begam Kis Kam Ki
Teri Marazi Tu Jane, Meri Marazi Main Janu
Maine Jawani Tere Naam Ki, Naam Ki Ho Chori

Choli Ke Pichhe Kya Hai, Choli Ke Pichhe
Choli Ke Pichhe Kya Hai, Choli Ke Pichhe
Chunari Ke Niche Kya Hai, Chunari Ke Niche
Ho Choli Mein Dil Hai Mera,
Chunari Mein Dil Hai Mera Aah Ha
Ho Choli Mein Dil Hai Mera,
Chunari Mein Dil Hai Mera Vah Vah
Yeh Dil Mein Dungi Mere Yar Ko, Pyar Ko

Choli Mein Dil Hai Mera,
Chunari Mein Dil Hai Mera
Choli Mein Dil Hai Mera,
Chunari Mein Dil Hai Mera
Hoon Choli Mein Dil Hai Mera,
Chunari Mein Dil Hai Mera
Dil…Dil Hai Meraa…
Choli Mein Dil Hai Mera,
Chunari Mein Dil Hai Mera
Dil…Dil Hai Meraa…
Choli Mein Dil Hai Mera,
Chunari Mein Dil Hai Mera
Dil…Dil Hai Meraa…

Choli Mein Dil Hai Mera,

snippet.title: Franklin Found A Scary Ice Cream MONSTER in GTA 5
snippet.description:
Franklin Found A Scary Ice Cream MONSTER in GTA 5.

Franklin and his friends were making ice cream at home when a strange, lightning-like sound from the sky struck the ice cream, transforming it into a giant monster. The ice cream monster then began chasing Franklin and his friends.

snippet.title: Ashutosh Shashank Shekhar आशुतोष शशाँक शेखर | Shiv Stuti | Remove Negativity | Powerful Shiv Mantra
snippet.description:
◆Song : Ashutosh Shashank Shekhar
◆Singer : Kamlesh Mishra, Deepak Rana
◆Music : Ankur Kapoor
◆Lyrics : Traditional
◆Label  : Digiline Records

 @DigilineRecords 

Welcome to Digiline Records..!! for premium Bhakti Songs on YouTube..
India is a land of multiple faiths and religions but one spirit. Being spiritual is getting connected to the universe, communicating and listening to it. India offers more than thousands of religious songs, bhakti geets, bhajans to choose from the library of our music label “Digiline Records”. also has daily updates, new additions dedicated to Gods, Goddesses & Deities. Informative and soothing catalogue of divine dharmik energy.

📌 If you like this video, please Like 👍
📌 Share it with your family and friends
📌 Subscribe to our channel for more devotional and spiritual content

Thank you for your love and support 💙
🙏 Stay blessed, stay spiritual 🙏

शिव स्तुति: आशुतोष शशाँक शेखर (Shiv Stuti: Ashutosh Shashank Shekhar)
आशुतोष शशाँक शेखर,
चन्द्र मौली चिदंबरा,
कोटि कोटि प्रणाम शम्भू,
कोटि नमन दिगम्बरा ॥
निर्विकार ओमकार अविनाशी,
तुम्ही देवाधि देव
जगत सर्जक प्रलय करता,
शिवम सत्यम सुंदरा ॥

निरंकार स्वरूप कालेश्वर,
महा योगीश्वरा,
दयानिधि दानिश्वर जय,
जटाधार अभयंकरा ॥

शूल पानी त्रिशूल धारी,
औगड़ी बाघम्बरी,
जय महेश त्रिलोचनाय,
विश्वनाथ विशम्भरा ॥

नाथ नागेश्वर हरो हर,
पाप साप अभिशाप तम,
महादेव महान भोले,
सदा शिव शिव संकरा ॥

जगत पति अनुरकती भक्ति,
सदैव तेरे चरण हो,
क्षमा हो अपराध सब,
जय जयति जगदीश्वरा ॥

जनम जीवन जगत का,
संताप ताप मिटे सभी,
ओम नमः शिवाय मन,
जपता रहे पञ्चाक्षरा ॥

आशुतोष शशाँक शेखर,
चन्द्र मौली चिदंबरा,
कोटि कोटि प्रणाम शम्भू,
कोटि नमन दिगम्बरा ॥
कोटि नमन दिगम्बरा..
कोटि नमन दिगम्बरा..
कोटि नमन दिगम्बरा..

श्री शिव पंचाक्षर स्तोत्र | शिव चालीसा | आरती: श्री शिव, शंकर, भोलेनाथ

snippet.title: 🛑LIVE- FIFA World Cup 2026: The Last Dance of Football Legends 🐐
snippet.description:
🛑 LIVE 🔴 FIFA World Cup 2026: The Last Dance of Football Legends 🐐 | FC 26 Gameplay | Road to Glory

Welcome to the ultimate football gaming experience! ⚽🔥

The world's greatest football legends return for one final dance on the biggest stage in FIFA World Cup 2026. Experience the thrill, drama, passion, and unforgettable moments as iconic players fight for glory in what could be their last World Cup appearance.

🏆 Will Messi defend his crown?
🏆 Can Ronaldo achieve the impossible?
🏆 Will Brazil reclaim football supremacy?
🏆 Which nation will lift the most prestigious trophy in football?

Join us LIVE as we play through the FIFA World Cup 2026 tournament featuring realistic gameplay, legendary teams, epic goals, dramatic penalty shootouts, and unforgettable football moments.

✅ Penalty Shootouts

snippet.title: Top 10 Golden Hits Jebathotta Jeyageethangal | Father S J Berchmans
snippet.description:
Album : Jebathotta Jeyageethangal 
Lyrics& Sung By : Father S J Berchmans 

நிச்சயமாக, ஜெபதோட்ட ஜெயகீதங்கள் (Jebathotta Jeyageethangal) பாடல்கள் பலருடைய வாழ்க்கையிலும் ஆழமான தாக்கத்தை ஏற்படுத்தியவை. பாதர் எஸ்.ஜே. பெர்க்மான்ஸ் (Fr. S.J. Berchmans) அவர்களின் குரலில் அமைந்த இந்தத் தொகுப்பில் உள்ள சில மிக முக்கியமான மற்றும் மறக்க முடியாத பாடல்களின் பட்டியலை இங்கே தொகுத்துள்ளேன்.
ஜெபதோட்ட ஜெயகீதங்களின் இந்தத் தொகுப்பு உங்களுக்குப் பயனுள்ளதாக இருக்கும் என்று நம்புகிறேன். இதில் உங்களுக்கு மிகவும் பிடித்த பாடல் எது என்று பதிவிடவும் ...

#fathersjberchmans #father
